title: RunanywhereAI/runanywhere-sdks

title: svasenkov/greedy-token
summary: Route dev tasks through tool → python → ollama → RAG before escalating to Cursor

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 182 + rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: fcavalcantirj/agent-faces
summary: Give your AI agent a talking, lip-syncing face — 12-emotion particle face, in-browser Whisper (WebGPU), bring-your-own-agent bridge. MIT.

title: QodeXcli/QodeX
summary: QodeX — a local-first LLM agent & AI coding CLI agent for your terminal. Runs local models (Qwen3-Coder via Ollama/LM Studio) with deterministic guardrails, 100+ tools, a real browser, smart vision & shareable live artifacts. Open source, Apache-2.0.

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: dengkaitraining/ai-tools-compose
summary: base : ollama + open webui, app : n8n

title: jimmc414/claude-code-plugin-marketplace
summary: Community Claude Code plugin marketplace - skills, agents, commands, and hooks for extending Claude Code. Import/export tools included.

title: bbarit/bbarit-agent-oss
summary: Open-source AI coding agent for your terminal — one Rust binary, 15+ LLM providers, 1,000+ models. A self-hostable Claude Code / Codex CLI alternative (MIT).

title: sankar-ramamoorthy/rag-foundry-universal
summary: CPU-only RAG stack: PDFs→Docling→Ollama→pgvector. Windows/macOS/Linux. Docker Compose. Graph-aware code search + scanned PDF OCR.

title: nidhi-menon/HealthSteward
summary: Local, privacy-first agentic AI for patients navigating fragmented care

title: GRU-953/GRU953-Studio
summary: Describe an app in plain words and a team of AI specialists designs, builds, tests and privately publishes it to your own GitHub — no coding needed. A Claude Code plugin for non-technical people. Free for personal use; commercial licence available.

title: stevenfackley/GhostCrab
summary: Native iOS, iPadOS, Mac Catalyst, and Android client for OpenClaw Gateway — manage self-hosted AI agents, Ollama, and LM Studio backends from your phone, tablet, or Mac.

title: raydeStar/sir-thaddeus
summary: Private, local-first AI assistant for Windows - use your own model, keep durable memory, and approve every sensitive tool.

title: NavisualGuide/navisual
summary: AI desktop guide that shows you where to click — it observes, never clicks. Free tier (no sign-up), BYOK or local Ollama, source-available.

title: rudi193-cmd/willow-2.0
summary: Willow 2.0 — local-first memory, MCP tools, and fleet coordination for AI agents. Postgres KB, Ollama default, Grove LAN remote.

title: Calculator5329/GatesAI-Chat
summary: Local-first desktop AI chat workspace (React 19 + Tauri 2 + Rust) with Claude-Code-style local agency: files, shell, git, SQLite, web search, image generation, MCP tools, semantic memory, and background sub-agents — any OpenRouter or local Ollama model, offline-capable, data stays on your machine.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: rm199x/dairack
summary: Local-first terminal AI with coordinated local or remote Ollama compute

title: 91zgaoge/StoryMoss
summary: 🌿 StoryMoss (草苔) — AI导演式小说创作系统。Tauri+Rust驱动的桌面写作软件，集成知识图谱、伏笔追踪、StyleDNA风格引擎、协同编辑、7阶段全自动创作工作流。让AI成为你的创作搭档，越写越懂你。

title: plmbr/notebook-intelligence
summary: A JupyterLab extension supporting Claude Code, Copilot, Ollama, and OpenAI-compatible LLMs, with MCP, skills, plugins, and notebook agents.

title: between-mirror/between
summary: A local-first instrument for reading your own message archive honestly. A mirror, not a verdict.

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: imDarshanGK/localmind
summary: Offline AI assistant - chat with your documents locally. No cloud, no API key, no data leaks. Built with Python + FastAPI + Ollama + LangChain.

title: Vitalisimon/desktoplab
summary: Local-first desktop control plane for development agents.

title: Aseiel/VideoHighlighter
summary: Open-source local AI video analyzer powered by Ollama. Visual search, automatic highlights, scene/action/object detection, audio analysis, and subtitle generation. Free, offline alternative to Twelve Labs, Runway, and Descript.

title: mtrnix/metronix-memory
summary: Metronix Memory is self-hosted memory infrastructure for AI agents: MCP-native, local-model friendly, with hybrid RAG, a temporal knowledge graph and ontology layer, durable memory, freshness checks, and agent-scoped context

title: fivepanelhat/coastal-alpine-stack
summary: Full-stack edge architecture monorepo: field firmware → mTLS MQTT → Core SDK → Weaver → domain portals → Ollama + Hailo-10H on RPi 5 16GB. K3s/compose, SecOps, data flywheel.

title: chriswu727/loop-agent
summary: Autonomous software delivery from product brief to verified implementation. Loop plans, builds, tests, and repairs in a task workspace, then hands back reviewable artifacts or Git changes with a replayable Receipt.

title: ram0verflow/continuumd
